hero.title: Websites that convert.
hero.subtitle: Not just exist.
hero.description: Custom-built websites, brand identities, and graphic design, crafted in Switzerland for businesses that refuse to look ordinary.

meta.title: Web Design & Graphic Design from Wil SG, Switzerland
meta.description: Custom-built websites, logos and graphic design for Swiss SMEs and restaurants. Based in Wil SG, Switzerland. Fast, individual and unmistakable. From CHF 600.

mission.label: Why Generics Studio
mission.title: A good website is the best salesperson.
mission.subtitle: Is it doing its job?
mission.description: Most websites silently lose customers every day: through slow load times, generic templates, and unclear messaging. We build sites that actively work for the business.

benefits.title: Higher conversion rates
benefits.description: Purposeful structure, clear hierarchy, and conversion logic built in from day one. Not bolted on later.

benefits.title: Live in days, not months
benefits.description: First working prototype within days. No lengthy approval chains, no wasted time on revisions that don't matter.

benefits.title: 100% custom, no templates
benefits.description: Every pixel is built for the brand. The result looks like no other website because it was made for no one else.

benefits.title: Direct access to the makers
benefits.description: No account managers, no middlemen. Work directly with the people building the project. Fast decisions, clear answers.

benefits.title: Timeless design
benefits.description: We design for longevity, not trends. No embarrassing redesign needed after two years.

benefits.title: Swiss quality standard
benefits.description: Precision, reliability, and craftsmanship, applied to every line of code and every design decision.

process.label: How we work
process.title: From first call
process.subtitle: to live website.
process.description: No chaos, no waiting. Every project follows the same proven flow, so you always know what comes next.

steps.title: Discovery call
steps.description: We understand the business, goals, and audience. A clear scope and honest timeline are provided before any commitment.

steps.title: Design & build
steps.description: A working prototype is ready within days. Feedback rounds are short and focused. Every decision has a reason.

steps.title: Launch & handover
steps.description: We go live on the agreed schedule. Full handover with documentation so there is never a dependency on us.

comparison.heading: Why not WordPress?
comparison.description: Most agencies install 20 plugins and call it web design. The result: slow, vulnerable, and generic. We build from scratch.
comparison.captionA: Heavy plugins, uncompressed images and bloated themes drag WordPress sites below 50. Google ranks you accordingly.
comparison.captionB: Lean code, optimised assets and server-side rendering push every page to 100. Less load time, more conversions.

features.heading: What you get.
features.description: No page builders. No plugin chaos. Every website is developed from scratch for your business.

items.title: Lightning-fast load times
items.description: No JavaScript overhead, no unused plugins. Statically generated and globally delivered. Under 1 second is standard.

items.title: SEO built in from day one
items.description: Semantic HTML, Schema.org, sitemap, optimised meta tags, and green Core Web Vitals. As a foundation, not an afterthought.

items.title: Security without compromise
items.description: No WordPress attack surface, no outdated plugins, no public admin panel. No database to attack.

items.title: Fully responsive
items.description: Mobile-first and tested across all screen sizes. Not a generic breakpoint grid, but a layout made for your design.

items.title: Simple content management
items.description: Optionally connected to a headless CMS. Edit text, images, and pages yourself, no technical knowledge, no need to call us.

items.title: Handover with documentation
items.description: Hosting, domain, CMS, and code belong to you. With a clear guide so you know exactly what you have and are never dependent on us.

comparison.heading: A brand is a system.
comparison.description: A logo alone is not enough. Only when logo, colour, typography, and guidelines work together does a brand become truly memorable.

pillars.title: Logo system
pillars.description: Primary, secondary, and monochrome. The right variant for every context, from letterhead to Instagram profile.

pillars.title: Colour palette
pillars.description: Primary, secondary, and neutral tones in HEX, RGB, and CMYK. Consistency across every channel and medium.

pillars.title: Typography
pillars.description: Two to three fonts with a clear hierarchy. Headings, body text, accents, always coherent.

pillars.title: Brand guidelines
pillars.description: All your brand rules in one document. For every supplier who ever works with them.

features.heading: How your brand is built.
features.description: Three phases. No surprises. You always know where we are and what comes next.

steps.title: Discovery & briefing
steps.description: We learn about your business, your audience, and your competitors. Together we define tone, positioning, and visual direction. You get a clear brief before a single design is created.

steps.title: Concept & design
steps.description: Based on the brief, we develop logo concepts, colour palette, and typography system. You see initial drafts, give feedback, we refine. No endless revision rounds, focused, clear, efficient.

steps.title: Handover & guidelines
steps.description: You receive all final files in all formats, plus a complete brand guidelines document. You can start immediately, and everyone who ever works with your brand knows exactly how.

comparison.heading: Why not Canva?
comparison.description: Canva templates look like Canva templates. Everyone recognises them. Custom design is the difference between scrolling and stopping.
comparison.captionA: Pre-made template, stock icons, and generic gradients. Identical to tens of thousands of other posts. Zero recognition value.
comparison.captionB: Every element aligned to your brand. Your own typography, colours, and visual language. Unmistakable.

features.heading: What we deliver.
features.description: From a single social post to a complete graphics package. All custom, all tailored to your brand.

items.title: Social media designs
items.description: Posts, stories, and thumbnails for Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook. Optimised for every platform.

items.title: Advertising banners & ads
items.description: Display ads and social ad graphics in all common formats. Built for conversion.

items.title: Illustrations
items.description: Custom illustrations for websites, campaigns, or presentations. From icon to full scene.

items.title: Brand templates
items.description: Reusable templates for communication and marketing. Set up once, used permanently.

items.title: Presentations
items.description: Pitch decks and company slides in PowerPoint or Keynote. Professional and consistent.

items.title: Icons & UI elements
items.description: Custom icon sets and interface graphics that match your brand and your product.

comparison.heading: Print-ready or print-capable?
comparison.description: A poorly prepared file costs time, money and frustration. We deliver files that work the first time.
comparison.captionA: RGB colour mode, 72 DPI, and no bleed. The result: wrong colours, blurry edges, and print rejections.
comparison.captionB: CMYK colour mode, 300 DPI, 3 mm bleed, and correct ICC profiles. Perfect on the first print.

features.heading: What you get.
features.description: No DIY prints, no half-finished layouts. Professional print design that works at any printer in the world.

items.title: Print-ready PDF files
items.description: CMYK colour mode, correct bleed, embedded fonts. No rework, no rejections at the print shop.

items.title: Multi-page layouts
items.description: Consistent design throughout every page. Every spread aligned, every column precise, every margin deliberate.

items.title: Business cards & stationery
items.spec: 85 x 55 mm · DIN A4 · single / double-sided
items.description: Corporate identity in a small format. Logo, colours, and typography applied consistently, single or double-sided.

items.title: Flyers & posters
items.spec: A6 to A0 · digital & offset print
items.description: From A6 to A0. Every format correctly set up, with special formats on request. Optimised for offset and digital print.

items.title: Correct colour profiles
items.spec: ISO Coated v2 · PSO Uncoated · special profiles
items.description: The right profile for every printing method and paper. Colours that look on paper the way they look on screen.

items.title: Print coordination
items.description: On request we coordinate directly with your printer: check proofs, approve colour samples, ensure delivery.
